tracks.meaning: a straight thin projectile with a pointed head and feathers or fins, shot from a bow as a weapon or in sport
a narrow pointed land formation or sandbank that projects into water
a symbol (→) used to indicate direction, progression, or a link between two points
a straight line or course that something follows, particularly in medical or anatomical contexts
the direction in which something is moving or pointing
a particularly excellent or remarkable person or thing
a curved line on a graph or diagram showing the path or trajectory of a chemical reaction or particle
a pointer or indicator symbol used in user interfaces and programming
